prestazioni: ADU 2.2L 20V Inline-5 (engine code: ADU) with a custom-built Garrett GT2860R-5 turbocharger (84 trim, 0.82 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tial 44mm external wastegate for precise boost control at 1.5 bar (21.7 psi), replacing the stock K26-7000 turbo

Full 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system by Supersprint, featuring a 50mm primary tube merge collector and a 100-cell catalytic converter for optimized scavenging while maintaining Euro emissions compliance

Bosch Motorsport 0280155862 high-flow fuel injectors (440cc/min) coupled with a Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump and an AEM X-Series wideband AFR gauge (30-0300) for real-time air-fuel ratio monitoring, supported by a custom Motec M48 ECU reflash with 5-axis ignition and fuel maps

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #DFV-01-AU-01) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, custom-valved for the RS2’s 5-link rear suspension geometry, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars (part #54655-1) to reduce body roll under hard cornering

Porsche 993 Turbo front brake calipers (4-piston, 322mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid, complemented by a custom brake bias valve to fine-tune front/rear braking balance for track use
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 RS2-specific widebody kit (part #RB-AU001) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler, extending the rear track by 50mm and the front by 40mm for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics

OEM+ Audi Sport quattro S1-inspired front bumper lip (3D-printed in ABS plastic) with integrated LED fog lights (Hella Rallye 4000, part #009400001) and a custom carbon fiber splitter with 30mm overhang for increased front downforce

Recaro Sportster CS (part #38906005) front seats in black Nappa leather with red Alcantara centers, paired with a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 2.5mm wall thickness) by Custom Cages UK, designed to retain the rear seat functionality while adding chassis rigidity

Full de-chrome treatment with matte black vinyl wrap (3M 1080 Satin Black, part #1080-G12) on all exterior trim, including window surrounds, grille, and badges, complemented by OEM Audi Sport quattro RS2 decals (part #893857533A) in gloss white for period-correct homage

Custom 18x9.5 ET20 (front) and 18x10.5 ET25 (rear) BBS RS-GT II wheels (part #RSGTII-1895-20F/RSGTII-18105-25R) in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear) for maximum mechanical grip
